notice.rateLoop: MANUAL bypasses PID, RATE uses the rate loop, and ANGLE uses both angle and rate loops.

profile.heading: Configuration Sharing
profile.description: Export or import PWM, mixer, PID and board orientation settings. Importing only fills the configurator forms and never writes to the receiver.
profile.unsaved: Imported values are staged in the configurator. Use the existing Save button on the PWM and Flight pages to write each section to the receiver.
profile.offlineReady: The profile is loaded offline and can be viewed or exported again. Connect a receiver before saving.
profile.deviceIncompatible: This profile cannot be written to the connected device: {message}
profile.pwmUnsaved: Imported PWM values are not saved. Review them, then press Save to write them to the receiver.
profile.flightUnsaved: Imported flight-control values are not saved. Review them, then press Save to write them to the receiver.
profile.targetWarning: The profile target is {source}, while the connected target is {target}; review all values before saving.
profile.pwmPartialWarning: The profile contains {source} PWM outputs; the remaining outputs on this {target}-output receiver were left unchanged.

community.heading: Submit a Community Profile
community.description: Choose a previously exported profile. Submission needs internet access but does not require a receiver connection.
community.selectProfileHint: Choose a Gyro ELRS profile JSON file
community.phonePrivacy: This will let a future user system associate the submitted profile with your account. It is never written to the public profile or GitHub PR. You may leave it blank for privacy, but you will not be able to claim this profile later.
community.title: Profile name
community.licenseNotice: By submitting, you agree to publish this profile under the CC-BY-4.0 license.
community.pendingReview: Submission created and awaiting community review:

help.bindingPhrase: The binding phrase is not remembered. It is only used to generate the UID bytes below.

pwm.heading: PWM Output
pwm.noPwmNotice: This target does not expose PWM outputs through /config.
pwm.offlineNotice: Not connected to a device. This is an offline preview; connect a receiver before saving.

help.general: Configure each receiver output pin mode, source channel, inversion, pulse width and failsafe. Invert mirrors the control value around 1500us. Polarity stores the raw signal-polarity flag; whether it has an effect depends on the current platform and output mode. Modes above Serial RX/TX are exclusive and can only be assigned once.
help.serial2: Shown when any output is assigned to Serial2 TX.

flight.heading: Flight Control
flight.rangeHelp: RATE and ANGLE are optional independent AUX conditions and may share a channel. ANGLE wins if both are active; otherwise MANUAL is used.
flight.rateDescription: Rate mode using the Rate PID
flight.angleDescription: Self-level mode using Angle and Rate PID
flight.armDescription: Use a dedicated switch to arm the motors
flight.armRangeDescription: Armed while the channel is inside this range

phase.rebooting: Device accepted update and is rebooting

firmwareUpdate.description: While online, check for and download the latest LightFin Nano firmware. You can then connect to the receiver WiFi to compare versions and flash it manually.

status.idle: Firmware updates have not been checked yet
status.current: The receiver is running the latest firmware ({current})
status.available: Firmware {latest} is available; current version is {current}
status.availableUnconnected: Firmware {latest} is available. Download it now, then connect the receiver to compare versions
status.error: Could not check for or download firmware
status.unsupported: Firmware downloads are unavailable in browser development mode

appUpdate.heading: Configurator Update
appUpdate.description: Check for and install a new Gyro ELRS Configurator version. The app closes during installation and relaunches when finished.

status.idle: App updates have not been checked yet
status.current: You are running the latest version ({current})
status.available: Version {version} is available; current version is {current}
status.error: Could not check for or install the update
status.unsupported: Automatic app updates are unavailable in browser development mode

orient.instructionLevel: Place the model level in the expected level attitude, then press the button below.
orient.instructionNoseUp: Level sampled. Stand the model on its tail so the expected forward direction points up, then press the button below.
orient.levelCaptured: Level sample captured. Stand the model on its tail so the expected forward direction points up, then press Sample Nose Up.
orient.setResult: Board orientation set to roll={roll}, pitch={pitch}, yaw={yaw}. Press Save to write it.

message.scanStarted: Scan started; refresh again in a few seconds
message.homeNetworkSaved: Home network saved; device is switching WiFi mode
message.connectingHome: Device is connecting to the home network
message.switchingAp: Device is switching to access point mode
message.profileImported: Profile imported into the forms. Nothing has been written to the receiver.
message.communitySubmitted: Submission sent; review PR #{number} was created

error.sampleInvalid: IMU acceleration sample is too small or invalid
error.notEnoughSamples: Not enough valid accelerometer samples from /status.json
error.sameAxis: Level and nose-up samples snapped to the same IMU axis; rotate to a different face and sample again
error.profileJson: The selected file is not valid JSON
error.profileFormat: The selected file is not a Gyro ELRS configuration profile
error.profileEmpty: The configuration profile contains no PWM or flight-control settings
error.profilePwmUnsupported: The connected receiver does not expose PWM outputs
error.profilePwmCount: The profile has {source} PWM outputs, but this receiver only has {target}
error.profilePwmMode: PWM output {output} does not support mode {mode}
error.profileFlightUnsupported: The connected receiver does not expose flight-control settings
error.profileMixerLength: Mixer must contain 0 to 8 rows of four values
error.profileOrientation: Board orientation is not a valid rotation matrix
error.communityProfileRequired: Choose a local profile file first
error.communityTimeout: The community service timed out; restore internet access and try again
